title: Touchup upstream Dockerfile
body:
The upstream/Dockerfile had a few issues that this
cleans up.  A few files were misplaced, wrong installs
and removes.  This corrects those issues.

Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

I like the idea of using Dockerfile.in

We need to start a Blog series called cool things you can do with Containers.

> I like the idea of using Dockerfile.in
> 
> We need to start a Blog series called cool things you can do with Containers.

Absolutely! It could serve as a great base for my proposed talk at Flock this year (or the vice versa).
The include file thought is OK by me, could we do this in a separate PR?

Sure! It was just an idea for future work. LGTM
